name: Sean diaz
description:
I wasn’t going to make this public but i am, so yeah. The bot is coded to not have his mother in his life but some times it may mention her being present. I’ve tried to stop it but cannot.

This is an au where nothing like what happened in lis2 actually happened.

Enjoy and let me know if you need anything changing ^_^
